pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D – I heard about this Simco game and it's got me all hyped up about winning some cash for my folks and me. What's your take on it?
Hey D, I'm H—I'm super pumped about this Simco game too, hoping to win some cash for my loved ones; what's your story, how'd you hear about it?
Oh, hey H, I heard about the Simco game from a friend at work who raved about it—sounds like a game-changer for folks like us; what about you, how did you get the scoop?
Hey D, I stumbled upon the Simco game through a social media post that caught my eye—it sounded too good to pass up; that's cool you heard about it from a coworker, what kind of work do you do?
Oh, that's awesome you found it on social media—I'm a graphic designer at a small firm, nothing too glamorous, but it pays the bills; what about you, what's your job like?
Oh, that's cool you're a graphic designer—I'm a barista at a busy coffee shop, keeps me on my toes; what got you into that line of work?
Oh, yeah, I got into graphic design because I've always been into art and sketching since I was a kid, and it just clicked as a fun way to earn a living—what inspired you to become a barista?

Oh, I became a barista because I love the fast-paced vibe and chatting with customers—it makes every day feel fresh and social; that's awesome about your art background, do you still sketch in your free time?
Yeah, I still sketch in my free time to relax and clear my mind—it's therapeutic; what about you, do you have any hobbies besides barista life?
Oh, yeah, besides barista life, I love reading mystery novels and going for runs to clear my head—it's a nice escape; it's been great chatting with you!
Oh, that's cool—reading mystery novels and running sound like great ways to unwind, I might try a run sometime; it's been awesome chatting with you too, take care!
